heading: Multi-Region and Multi-Cloud Clusters
body:
Atlas supports deploying Search Nodes across multiple
regions and cloud providers. When deploying Search Nodes
for multi-region or multi-cloud clusters, consider the following:

- Atlas deploys the same number of Search Nodes
  in each region.

- All nodes across regions have the same [Search Tier](select-tiers-for-search-nodes).

- If you use the [Atlas Administration API](atlas-admin-api)
  to add a new region to existing Search Nodes, Atlas deploys
  the same number of Search Nodes in the new region. However, if the
  new region does not support the current search tier, the
  request fails.
